---
name: Command Request
about: Request documentation for a new command
title: "[COMMAND] "
labels: command-request
assignees: ""
---

# Command Name

Example:

cut

---

# Description

Explain what this command does.

Example:

`cut` extracts specific columns from text files.

---

# Example Usage

Example command:

```bash
cut -d ":" -f1 /etc/passwd
```

---

# Why This Command Should Be Added

Explain why this command is useful for Termux users.
